projectDescription: A collection of beginner-friendly Python mini-projects covering games, utilities, and interactive CLI applications.
keyFeatures: Calculator with persistent calculation history saved to file
Number guessing game with random number generation and feedback
Two-dice rolling game with replay support
Fake headline generator using randomized subject-action-place combinations
Interactive restaurant ordering system with a menu and running total
publicApiSurface: Calculator_With_History.py: main(), calculate(input_user), show_history(), clear_history(), save_to_history(equation, result)
